en.name: Zenit Sport-1 Handguard
en.description: The Zenit Sport-1 handguard is a lightweight and versatile accessory designed for the AK platform. It features multiple mounting points for various attachments, making it ideal for tactical setups. Crafted from high-quality materials, it offers durability and reliability in demanding conditions.

en.name: Zenit Sport-1 Handguard (FDE)
en.description: The Zenit Sport-1 handguard is a lightweight and versatile accessory designed for the AK platform. It features multiple mounting points for various attachments, making it ideal for tactical setups. Crafted from high-quality materials, it offers durability and reliability in demanding conditions. Flat Dark Earth finish.

en.name: Zenit Gas Block
en.description: Modified gas block to fit the Zenitco Sport kits

en.name: Zenit B-33 with tight rivets
en.description: The good old B-33 Dustcover, just with tight rivets. Fits perfectly with Zenitco Sport kits.

en.name: Zenit B-33 with tight rivets (FDE)
en.description: The good old B-33 Dustcover, just with tight rivets. Fits perfectly with Zenitco Sport kits. Flat Dark Earth finish.

en.name: SAG MK3 Chassis System
en.description: The MK3 Chassis allows the use of factory Iron Sights when installed and allows for maintenance of the firearm without disturbing your optic set up (Rear section of the railed upper is removable). Fits all standard stamped AKM with standard length gas system. Precision Machined from 6061 T6 Aluminum.
